description: Composition Knee length pink yoga shorts made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, has an elasticated waistband and embroidery on the left side Fit Regular Wash care Hand or machine wash cold with a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Tumble dry low Dry in shade Do not bleach Warm iron These yoga shorts from urban yoga have a breathable fabric, and a soft waistband. Team them up with a cool T-shirt and a comfortable pair of shoes. Model statistics The product is a size 28 on a model of height 5'8" and waist 26"
